pages.text: 爸爸说。门口，Coco 挥着手喊：
pages.text_en: "Bubu, we're going somewhere magical today!" said Dad. At the entrance, Coco waved and called out: "Bubu! Over here!"
The ball rolled faster and faster. "Wow! It moves by itself!" Bubu exclaimed. Coco said: "It's rolling so fast! This is called gravity!"

pages.text: 咘咘问。Coco 翻转磁铁——啪！吸住了。
pages.text_en: "Why don't they want to be together?" Bubu asked. Coco flipped the magnet — snap! They stuck together. "Look! Flip it and it's attract! Same side is repel!"

pages.text: Coco 指着自己的影子说：
pages.text_en: Bubu giggled: "Look! I've become a rainbow!" Coco pointed at her shadow: "My shadow is orange! Yours is pink!"

pages.text: 声音从管道传来。Coco 在另一头喊：
pages.text_en: "Ni hao —" the voice traveled through the tube. Coco shouted from the other end: "Hello! Bubu, try saying Hello!" Bubu gathered her courage: "He...Hello!"

pages.text: 咘咘伸手想摸。Coco 在外面喊：
pages.text_en: "I'm inside a bubble!" Bubu reached out to touch it. Coco cheered from outside: "Bubble! You're in a big bubble! So cool!"

pages.text: 咘咘主动用英文说。Coco 开心地回：
pages.text_en: "Bye bye, Coco!" Bubu said in English on her own. Coco happily replied: "Bye bye! See you next time! Let's go to the zoo next!"

pages.text: 睡觉前，咘咘用积木搭了一个小滚球轨道。
她骄傲地说，把今天 Coco 教的单词都用上了。
pages.text_en: Before bed, Bubu built a little ball track with blocks. "NOMI, look, the ball can roll by itself!" she said proudly, using all the English words Coco had taught her.
